steps.clue: Defend the generator, then repair the four ventilation units.
Read the television codes, set the punch clocks, and enter the spare code.
Lead the red Nova 6 crawler to the Transfusion Facility.
Use A.D.A.M. to recover and return the stolen canister.
Cool and install the server, then enter the three staff codes.
Set the six power boxes and restore the bunker power.
Repair A.D.A.M., then escort the Elemental Orb to the interrogation room.
Charge the four canisters, return the Avogadro to the APD, and transport him.
